case_title: CLOWN ALLEY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION vs. SOPHIE'S COOKHOUSE, L.L.C. et al

docket_entries.description: REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO QUASH FILED BY DEFENDANT SOPHIE'S COOKHOUSE, L.L.C.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, CALENDAR OF JAN-29-1997, DENIED 5 DAYS TO PLEAD; PRIOR ACTION WAS PREMATURELY FILED BECAUSE EXPIRATION DATE HAD NOT ELAPSED BEFORE FILING OF THE COMPLAINT; THERFORE, NO CAUSE OF ACTION; THE 3 DAY NOTICE NOT DEFECTIVE.
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLOWN ALLEY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-07-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SOPHIE'S COOKHOUSE, L.L.C. HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

MEMO TO SET RETURNED ,NO ANSWER ON FILE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLOWN ALLEY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SOPHIE'S COOKHOUSE, L.L.C.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: PLTF ATNY J.RENTSCHLER HAD LEFT MESSAGE ON DEPT 1 VOICEMAIL LATE FRIDAY STATING THAT CASE WOULD SETTLE BUT MORE TIME WAS NEEDED. SHE SAID THAT SHE WOULD APPEAR FOR TRIAL ON MONDAY TO ASK FOR CONTINUANCE UNLESS CLERK PHONED HER STATING THAT SHE DID NOT NEED TO APPEAR. IT WAS ASSUMED THAT SINCE SHE WAS NEVER CONTACTED AND TOLD NOT TO APPEAR, THAT SHE WOULD APPEAR AS SHE STATED. PLTF DID NOT APPEAR. DEFT COUNSEL APPEARED & LEFT COURTROOM AFTER BEING TOLD BY COURT TO CONTACT PLTF COUNSEL. COURT ORDERS TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, PLTF FAILING TO APPEAR.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLOWN ALLEY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SOPHIE'S COOKHOUSE, L.L.C. DOES 1 THROUGH 25 SUMMONS ISSUED
